description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners, standing upright on a small white dock or stand. The front features a large, glossy touchscreen display with a single circular home button at the bottom, typical of earlier Apple iPhone models. The back is metallic with a gold finish, displaying a prominent silver Apple logo centered near the top and a small camera lens with flash in the upper left corner. The edges are smooth and metallic, with minimal visible buttons or ports. The phone is thin and lightweight, with a glass front and metal back, and is designed for handheld use. The dock is compact, white, and cradles the phone securely in an upright position.
description: A gold and white smartphone with a large glass touchscreen, metallic back, and a white dock. The Apple logo and camera are visible on the back, with a single home button on the front.
description_view_0: The back of the gold smartphone is visible, showing the silver Apple logo and rear camera in the upper left corner, with the phone standing in a white dock.
description_view_1: A side profile of the phone reveals its slim metallic edge and the white dock holding it upright, with minimal visible buttons.
description_view_2: The front of the phone displays a large black screen with a circular home button at the bottom, set in a white dock.
description_view_3: Another side profile, similar to view 1, showing the phone's thinness and the white dock from a slightly different angle.
attribute_brand_logo: A silver Apple logo is centered on the back of the phone, clearly visible and reflective.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen appears to be blank or turned off, with no visible icons, wallpaper, or interface elements.
attribute_camera_placement: A single camera lens with flash is located in the top left corner on the back of the phone.
attribute_button_layout: A single circular home button is visible on the front below the screen; side buttons are implied but not clearly visible in these views.
